name: redteam-review emits both a markdown pack and a json pack
command: printf 'resource x {}\n' > a.tf && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit md 2>/dev/null | grep -q '# Red-team' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"))' && echo w13-md-json 1>&2
